scripts.test:python-sdk: echo 'Python SDK (not an npm workspace): cd sdks/python && pip install -e .[dev] && pytest'
scripts.test:all: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run test:word-addin && npm run test:python-sdk
scripts.verify:all: npm run lint --workspaces --if-present && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present && npm run build --workspaces --if-present && npm run build:word-addin && npm run test:all
